arabic: وَحَدَّثَنِي عَنْ مَالِكٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيِّ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، قَالَ خَمْسٌ مِنَ الْفِطْرَةِ تَقْلِيمُ الأَظَافِرِ وَقَصُّ الشَّارِبِ وَنَتْفُ الإِبْطِ وَحَلْقُ الْعَانَةِ وَالاِخْتِتَانُ ‏.‏

english.narrator:
Yahya related to me from Malik from Said ibn Abi Said al-Maqburi
from his father that Abu Hurayra said, "There are five things from the
fitra:
english.text:
cutting the nails, trimming the moustache, removing the hair
from the armpit, shaving the pubic region and circumcision."

chapter.arabic: كتاب صفة النبى صلى الله عليه وسلم
chapter.english: The Description of the Prophet, may Allah Bless Him and Grant Him Peace
